problem: Sales teams waste hours manually personalizing and sending cold emails with poor deliverability
audience: B2B sales teams, SDRs, and founders at startups and SMBs doing outbound sales
pains: Low email deliverability and landing in spam
Juggling multiple tools for prospecting and outreach
Expensive enterprise tools with features they don't need
triggers: Hiring new SDRs and need to scale outreach
Switching from manual to automated outbound
